title: Use firearms to safely and humanely harvest wild game
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use firearms to safely and humanely harvest wild game demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan harvesting of wild game animals

pcs.text: Confirm anatomy and physical features of target animal, including location of vulnerable organs of target animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm anatomy and physical features of target animal, including location of vulnerable organs of target animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm anatomy and physical features of target animal, including location of vulnerable organs of target animal.

pcs.text: Identify location of habitats, habits and range of movements of target animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify location of habitats, habits and range of movements of target animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify location of habitats, habits and range of movements of target animal.

pcs.text: Determine timing of the harvest based on the activity patterns of the target animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine timing of the harvest based on the activity patterns of the target animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine timing of the harvest based on the activity patterns of the target animal.

pcs.text: Identify hazards associated with the harvest, and control risks according to workplace health and safety standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards associated with the harvest, and control risks according to workplace health and safety standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards associated with the harvest, and control risks according to workplace health and safety standards.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and public safety risks associated with the harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and public safety risks associated with the harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and public safety risks associated with the harvest.

pcs.text: Identify animal welfare guidelines and ensure they are followed during harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify animal welfare guidelines and ensure they are followed during harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify animal welfare guidelines and ensure they are followed during harvest.

elements.title: Prepare for the harvesting operations

pcs.text: Determine location and boundaries for the harvest according to the animal management plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check time and duration of the harvest and notify relevant personnel, where required.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take precautions to minimise hazards and risks associated with the harvest according to workplace health and safety standards.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take precautions to minimise environmental risks associated with the harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take precautions to minimise environmental risks associated with the harvest.

pcs.text: Confirm firearm licences, harvesting permits or exemptions as current according to statutory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm firearm licences, harvesting permits or exemptions as current according to statutory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm firearm licences, harvesting permits or exemptions as current according to statutory requirements.

pcs.text: Select firearm and ammunition types to comply with those recommended for the target animal according to regulatory requirements and animal ethics guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select firearm and ammunition types to comply with those recommended for the target animal according to regulatory requirements and animal ethics guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select firearm and ammunition types to comply with those recommended for the target animal according to regulatory requirements and animal ethics guidelines.

pcs.text: Zero and test-fire firearm according to industry practice

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Zero and test-fire firearm according to industry practice.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stow firearm unloaded and in safety mode for transport.

elements.title: Harvest animals

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace health and safety standards and statutory requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check each target animal to ensure it is dead prior to selecting the next target animal.

common_gaps_or_errors: Unable to specify workplace-relevant requirements or conditions

what_to_look_for: Accurate technical knowledge of maintain and store firearms according to manufacturer instructions and statutory requirements
minimum_expected_knowledge: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain and store firearms according to manufacturer instructions and statutory requirements.
indicators_of_partial_understanding: Knows the general concept but cannot specify technical detail
indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
